title: nigritella nigra subsp. rubra
intro: Nigritella nigra subsp. rubra, also known as the Red Spur Orchid, is a rare, terrestrial orchid native to the European Alps. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its purported medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Nigritella nigra subsp. rubra are believed to include the potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's tubers are typically dried and used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, although its use is largely anecdotal and requires further scientific research to confirm its efficacy.
